modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access MBM due to login issues.

full_description_text: The user was trying to log into MBM but could not access it. They mentioned forgetting their username and password. There was an error message saying they should logout and try again.
short_description: Unable to access MBM due to login issues.
description: The user was trying to log into MBM but could not access it. They mentioned forgetting their username and password. There was an error message saying they should logout and try again.
